Title: Prediction: The Shopify CEO's Pull Request Will Never Be Merged Nor Closed

Title: axios Compromised: npm Supply Chain Attack via Dependency Injection
Description: axios 1.14.1 was published to npm via a compromised maintainer account, injecting a trojanized dependency that executes a multi-platform reverse shell on install. No source code changes in axios itself, just a new entry in package.json.

Title: axios Compromised on npm - Malicious Versions Drop Remote Access Trojan - StepSecurity
